_doc: Phase LB-STEER  -  per-surface policy for CapabilitySteeringService.steer(), the single chokepoint every CLI generation path routes through (via the required `surface:` param on WizardCLIRunner.run). Each path declares its SteeringSurface; steer() folds the KEYWORD-MATCHED wisdom (for the user's goal) and/or the thin off-catalog building-blocks note into the CLI GOAL (the channel the CLI actually reads; folding into the goal is what the 2026-07-10 band-aid proved works for the iterate path). Values say what steer() should ADD, given what each path ALREADY provides: freshBuild/freshRetry already inject wisdom via HarnessContextAssembler + seed Lego, and jsAutofix is a deliberately-minimal single-file error fix, so steer() adds nothing for those (avoids double-injection + keeps the corpus-gravity-clean goal). The DESERT paths (ladderFallback, iterate, urlBranch) get the full fold; followUp is thin (bbNote only) because --continue resumes the prior workdir CLAUDE.md. idempotent via a sentinel so a re-steer or an already-steered goal is a no-op.
